{"id":"project-LICHEN-xa26","title":"edhoc: _decode_cbor_sequence only catches CBORDecodeEOF","description":"File: python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py
Lines: 189-199

The _decode_cbor_sequence function catches only CBORDecodeEOF but not other CBOR decoding exceptions:

```python
def _decode_cbor_sequence(data: bytes) -> list:
    items = []
    fp = io.BytesIO(data)
    while fp.tell() < len(data):
        try:
            item = cbor2.load(fp)
            items.append(item)
        except cbor2.CBORDecodeEOF:
            break
    return items
```

Malformed CBOR data (e.g., invalid type indicators, truncated values) will raise CBORDecodeError or other exceptions that propagate uncaught. This causes cryptic error messages instead of clear 'malformed message' errors.

Fix: Either catch CBORDecodeError or let exceptions propagate with added context (e.g., 'Failed to decode CBOR sequence').","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:09.187132Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:09.187174Z"}
